description: Pre-tool guardrails — enforce mandatory decisions and reactive code safety before code generation.

hooks.name: enforce-database-choice
hooks.description: Require SQL or NoSQL(Couchbase/MongoDB) confirmation before generating any repository, entity, or persistence config.
hooks.run: echo '[GUARDRAIL] Database choice must be confirmed before generating persistence code. Expected: SQL (PostgreSQL/MySQL/MariaDB) or NoSQL (Couchbase or MongoDB).' && exit 0

hooks.name: reject-unsupported-nosql
hooks.description: Block generation of Cassandra, Redis, or any NoSQL other than Couchbase or MongoDB.
hooks.run: echo '[GUARDRAIL] BLOCKED: Supported NoSQL engines are Couchbase and MongoDB only. Do not generate Cassandra or Redis persistence code.' && exit 1

hooks.name: no-blocking-in-reactive-path
hooks.description: Warn if blocking calls (.block(), Thread.sleep) are about to be added in controller/service/handler files.
hooks.run: echo '[GUARDRAIL] WARNING: Blocking call detected in reactive service/controller path. Use reactive operators instead (flatMap, switchIfEmpty, onErrorMap).' && exit 1

hooks.name: exception-contract-required
hooks.description: Ensure global exception handler is present before adding new controllers.
hooks.run: echo '[GUARDRAIL] Ensure GlobalExceptionHandler and ApiErrorResponse are implemented before adding new controllers.' && exit 0

hooks.name: no-secrets-in-config
hooks.description: Block hardcoded secrets in application config files.
hooks.run: echo '[GUARDRAIL] BLOCKED: Hardcoded secrets detected in config. Use environment variables or secrets manager references (${ENV_VAR}).' && exit 1
